Adds a <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> marker to your <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Elemental Gauge<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
The marker is made active after reaching <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and gaining 3 <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> then swapping to the opposite element. The marker is made inactive when the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> expires.
<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> becomes <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> when the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> marker is made active.

The marker is made active after reaching <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> then swapping to the opposite element. <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Blizzard<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> become <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> when the <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> marker is made active.
